name: ducknng_server_start
signature: ducknng_server_start(name, listen, contexts, recv_max_bytes, session_idle_ms, tls_cert_key_file, tls_ca_file, tls_auth_mode)
description: Start a named ducknng REP listener for SQL serving on an NNG URL.

name: ducknng_server_stop
description: Stop a named ducknng service and tear down its listener and worker thread.

name: ducknng_servers
returns: TABLE(service_id UBIGINT, name VARCHAR, listen VARCHAR, contexts INTEGER, running BOOLEAN, sessions UBIGINT)
description: List registered ducknng services in the current DuckDB database runtime.

name: ducknng_sessions
returns: TABLE(session_id UBIGINT, batch_no UBIGINT, eos BOOLEAN, last_touch_ms UBIGINT)
description: List active query sessions for a named ducknng service.

name: ducknng_remote_exec
description: Send an EXEC request over the real wire protocol and return rows changed from the remote reply metadata.

name: ducknng_remote_manifest
description: Request the remote ducknng manifest JSON from another ducknng-compatible service.

name: ducknng_socket
description: Open a client socket handle for a supported NNG protocol family.

name: ducknng_dial
description: Associate a client socket handle with a remote URL using req-style timeout semantics.

name: ducknng_close
description: Close a client socket handle and release its runtime state.

name: ducknng_sockets
returns: TABLE(socket_id UBIGINT, protocol VARCHAR, url VARCHAR, open BOOLEAN, connected BOOLEAN, send_timeout_ms INTEGER, recv_timeout_ms INTEGER)
description: List client socket handles registered in the current DuckDB runtime.

name: ducknng_request
description: Perform a one-shot req-style raw request and return the raw reply bytes.

name: ducknng_request_socket
description: Perform a req-style raw request using a previously dialed client socket handle and return the raw reply bytes.

name: ducknng_remote
description: Execute a remote row-returning query over REQ/REP and expose the unary Arrow IPC row reply as a DuckDB table function.
